description_long: This is a large, multi-tiered shelving unit with a modern, minimalist design. It features five horizontal rows of wide, flat wooden shelves supported by slender vertical metal frames on both sides and in the center. The shelves are open on all sides, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The wood appears to have a light, natural finish, while the metal supports are painted a neutral color, likely white or light gray. The structure is symmetrical and modular, making it suitable for use in public spaces such as libraries, retail stores, or urban community centers. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its open storage function.
description: A large, open, multi-tiered shelving unit with light wood shelves and slender metal supports, designed for accessible storage in public or urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing five rows of wide, open wooden shelves supported by vertical metal frames, with all shelving surfaces visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the shelving unit and the stacked arrangement of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edges of the shelves and the supporting frame, similar to the front but without any visible signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the vertical stacking of the shelves.
